title: Lake Feature Fix
description: A simple mod that fix crashes when Lake Features generating.
body:
**Lake Feature Fix**

Lake Feature Fix is a lightweight mod designed to address and resolve intermittent crashes that occur during world generation when custom lake features are generated.

# What the Project Does:

**Crash Prevention:** Fixes issues that can cause crashes during the generation of custom lake features.
**Minimalist Approach:** Offers a focused, efficient solution without adding unnecessary overhead or extra features.

# Why Download This Mod:

**Reliable Gameplay:** If you've experienced crashes related to custom lake generation, this mod improves stability, allowing you to build and explore without interruptions.
**Easy Integration:** Designed to work seamlessly with your existing mod setup, ensuring that your world generation remains consistent.
**Performance Focused:** Maintains high performance by only targeting the specific issue of custom lake crashes, leaving other game features unaffected.

# Critical Information Before Downloading:

**Compatibility:** Intended for mod setups that include custom lake features during world generation.
**Bug Reporting:** Please visit [Issue Tracker](https://github.com/CoolerProYT/Lake-Feature-Fix/issues) page to report bug.
